//: Cursor hooks for agora triggering. Place at <workspace>/.cursor/hooks.json.
//how: The `stop` hook fires when this tab finishes a turn. It checks the agora
//how2: inbox INSTANTLY (no long-poll) and re-prompts THIS tab only if messages
//how3: are already waiting. It must never block: a human shares the tab, and a
//how4: blocking hook queues their requests. loop_limit is bounded for the same reason.
